message:
fix(hook): persist hook_bead on agent bead when hooking work

The gt hook command was only updating the work bead's status to "hooked"
and setting the assignee, but not updating the agent bead's hook_bead
slot. This caused gt hook (status) to not find hooked work when querying
via the agent bead.

The fix adds a call to updateAgentHookBead() after successfully hooking
the work bead, matching the behavior of gt sling.

Fixes: hq-1be9ea

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
